description: Borrower with a prior short sale 4 years ago has re-established credit to 700+ and now purchases a primary residence, meeting the 4-year seasoning requirement.
parsed_text:
UNIFORM RESIDENTIAL LOAN APPLICATION

Mortgage Applied For: [X] Conventional [ ] FHA [ ] VA [ ] USDA
Amount: $295,200.00   Interest Rate: 7.375%   No. of Months: 360   Amortization Type: [X] Fixed Rate
Loan Purpose: [X] Purchase [ ] Refinance [ ] Construction   Property will be: [X] Primary Residence
Underwriting Note: Borrower experienced short sale on prior residence in October 2021 (4 years 2 months ago at time of application). Conventional guideline: 4-year waiting period met per FNMA B3-5.3-03. Borrower has re-established credit since event.

SECTION I — PROPERTY INFORMATION
Subject Property Address: 4418 Sunridge Court, San Antonio, TX 78249
County: Bexar   No. of Units: 1   Legal Description: Lot 16, Block 8, Sunridge Meadows
Year Built: 2007   Purpose of Loan: Purchase   Property Type: [X] Single Family
Purchase Price: $368,000.00   Estimated Value: $370,000.00

Marital Status: [X] Married   Dependents: 2 (ages 9, 13)   Citizenship: [X] U.S. Citizen
Present Address: 8100 Callaghan Road, Apt 214, San Antonio, TX 78230   [ ] Own [X] Rent   Years: 3
Phone: (210) 555-0537   Email: mstrickland@saelectrical.net
Derogatory Credit Explanation: Short sale October 2021 — 712 W. Nacogdoches Road, New Braunfels, TX.
Job loss due to COVID-19 layoff at prior employer. Re-employed within 8 months. No foreclosure. No bankruptcy.
4-Year Seasoning: Confirmed (Oct 2021 to Dec 2025 = 4 years 2 months).
